info.title: Registry Notary API
info.description: Standalone claim evaluation, rendering, and credential issuance API.

get.description: Returns the OpenID4VCI issuer metadata for Registry Notary' dc+sd-jwt issuance profile.

display.description: Proof that the civil registry currently records this person as alive.
display.name: Person is alive

get.summary: Fetch SD-JWT VC Type Metadata at the well-known location
get.description: Returns public SD-JWT VC Type Metadata at the SD-JWT VC well-known location. Consumers dereference an HTTPS vct by inserting /.well-known/vct between the host and the path; the server strips that prefix and matches the reconstructed vct (https://{host}/{vct_path}) against a configured OID4VCI credential configuration. The vct_path parameter represents the full path suffix and may contain nested path segments.

parameters.name: vct_path
parameters.description: Credential type path suffix from the configured vct, including nested path segments when configured.

display.description: Proof that the civil registry currently records this person as alive.
display.name: Person is alive

404.description: OpenID4VCI issuer is disabled or no configured vct matches the reconstructed URL

example.detail: status must be valid, suspended, or revoked
example.title: Invalid credential status

404.description: Credential status is disabled or not found

example.detail: credential status record was not found
example.title: Credential status not found

200.description: Standalone router accepted the reload request

example.detail: standalone router has no reloadable external config handle

get.description: Returns public SD-JWT VC Type Metadata for a configured OID4VCI credential configuration whose vct exactly matches the requested absolute URL. The vct_path parameter represents the full path suffix under /credentials and may contain nested path segments.

parameters.name: vct_path
parameters.description: Credential type path suffix under /credentials, including nested path segments when configured.

display.description: Proof that the civil registry currently records this person as alive.
display.name: Person is alive

404.description: OpenID4VCI issuer is disabled or no configured vct matches the requested URL

post.summary: Evaluate one configured federation profile for a trusted peer
post.description: Accepts a compact JWS request with typ registry-notary-request+jwt. This route is mounted only when federation is enabled and uses body-JWT authentication instead of API key or bearer authentication.

schema.description: Compact JWS signed federation evaluation request

200.description: Compact JWS signed federation evaluation response

403.description: Peer, profile, purpose, or requester/target identity path is not allowed

503.description: Source service or peer key service is unavailable

post.description: Issues a dc+sd-jwt credential for an authenticated self-attestation principal. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 9457 Problem Details.

400.description: Invalid credential request, proof, or type

get.description: Returns an authorization-code credential offer. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 9457 Problem Details.

post.description: Returns a c_nonce for proof-of-possession. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 9457 Problem Details.

get.summary: Complete eSignet login and render a pre-authorized-code offer
get.description: Public and unauthenticated. Consumes the login state, exchanges the eSignet code with private_key_jwt, validates the id_token, and mints one single-use pre-authorized_code. When configured, the offer also includes one numeric tx_code (PIN) shown out-of-band from the QR. Returns 404 when the pre-authorized-code flow is disabled.

200.description: Offer page with the credential offer URI and optional tx_code PIN

400.description: Login state, eSignet code, or id_token is invalid

get.description: Public and unauthenticated. Begins the eSignet authorization-code login as the confidential RP and 302-redirects the browser to eSignet. Mints no pre-authorized_code or credential material. Returns 404 when the pre-authorized-code flow is disabled. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 9457 Problem Details.

303.description: Redirect to the eSignet authorization endpoint

post.summary: Redeem a pre-authorized-code for an access token
post.description: Public and unauthenticated OID4VCI token endpoint for the pre-authorized-code grant. Accepts only grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:pre-authorized_code with a valid, unexpired, single-use pre-authorized_code. A matching tx_code is required when the credential offer includes a tx_code object. Mints a short-TTL Notary-signed access token plus a c_nonce. Returns 404 when the pre-authorized-code flow is disabled. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 9457 Problem Details.

example.error_description: pre-authorized code or tx_code is invalid

429.description: Too many token attempts (wrong-PIN lockout or random-code flood)
